# YAHSHUA HRIS

> YAHSHUA HRIS is a Philippine HR management system for small and mid-sized businesses, built by YAHSHUA Outsourcing Worldwide, Inc. (YOWI). It covers hiring, onboarding, attendance, leave, performance, DOLE compliance, and payroll integration. Flat pricing starting at PHP 4,000/month for up to 100 employees. No per-seat fees, no long-term contracts.

## What It Does

- DOLE compliance automation (company registration, OSH reports, annual medical reports, mandatory DOLE filings)
- Multi-platform job posting (LinkedIn, Facebook, YAHSHUA Jobs) with centralized applicant tracking
- Pre-screened talent pool for faster hiring
- Employee onboarding and 201 document management
- Attendance and leave management, integrated with ABBA Timekeeper
- Overtime, undertime, and rest day work tracking
- Performance evaluation with standard templates and custom forms
- Real-time two-way sync with YAHSHUA Payroll (no CSV exports or manual re-entry)
- Employee self-service portal (leave filing, payslip access, document requests)
- Memos and Notice-to-Explain distribution via email

## Who It's For

Philippine SMEs and growing businesses with 10 to 500+ employees that need DOLE-compliant HR without building a full in-house team. Serves 20 industries including Manufacturing, Retail, BPO, Healthcare, Education, Hospitality, Agriculture, and Construction.

## Key Differentiators

- Only HRIS in the Philippines with DOLE compliance automation built in (no add-ons)
- Flat monthly pricing starting at PHP 4,000 for up to 100 employees — not per-seat
- Real-time payroll sync with YAHSHUA Payroll — no manual data entry between HR and payroll
- SOC2 Type 2 certified and ISO 27001 certified — enterprise-grade security
- GDPR compliant and registered with the Philippine National Privacy Commission (DPA 2012)
- 17+ years in operation, 100,000+ users nationwide
- Tech + managed services hybrid — proprietary software with outsourced expertise available

## Certifications

- SOC2 Type 2
- ISO 27001
- GDPR Compliant
- DPA 2012 / NPC Registered
- EOPT-Ready (BIR Ease of Paying Taxes Act compliant)

## Notable Clients

Del Monte Philippines Inc., DTI Region X, University of St. La Salle - Bacolod, Polymedic Medical Plaza, Mindanao Golden Grains Corporation, 1A Express Hotel, Makimura Ramen Corp., Engagis Inc.

## Pricing Summary

- Starts at PHP 4,000/month for up to 100 employees
- Flat pricing — no per-seat fees
- No long-term contracts required
- 14-day free trial, no credit card required
- Full pricing: https://yahshuahris.com/pricing
